news.title: Samsung saw a record quarter, but it's not enough for investors. Here's why.
news.summary: Despite a record quarter, Samsung's (005930.KS) preliminary earnings results are causing volatility in the memory sector, just ahead of SK Hynix's (000660.KS) Friday IPO. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré takes a closer look in the video above.

news.title: The Market’s Hottest Stock Is Turning Cold
news.summary: Sandisk  has been one of the hottest U.S. tech stocks over the past year but it’s starting to cool off.  Shares of the memory storage company were down around 10% in Tuesday trading, among the sharpest fallers in the  The stock, up 635% this year, has fallen 23% over the past three trading days through Monday.
